title: POV: A new feature enters the chat. 🕺✨
summary: Google for Developers posts a comedic video sympathizing with software engineers dealing with new feature releases. The video features Justine Lai, M.E Francis, and Pete King and uses relatable humor about the SWE experience.
writeup: This Google for Developers short is a comedic sketch about the software engineering experience when a new feature is introduced. It leans on relatable humor rather than technical instruction, with appearances from Justine Lai, M.E Francis, and Pete King. The takeaway is tone rather than substance: a lighthearted look at how engineers react to new feature releases.
